heading: Advance payments by Secretary of Senate
label: 6561 Advance payments by Secretary of Senate
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 68e of this titleSection is from the Congressional Operations Appropriations Act, 1998, which is title I of the Legislative Branch Appropriations Act, 1998.

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: For fiscal year 1998, and each fiscal year thereafter, the Secretary of the Senate is authorized to make advance payments under a contract or other agreement to provide a service or deliver an article for the United States Government without regard to the provisions of .section 3324 of title 31

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: b Regulations
children.text: An advance payment authorized by subsection (a) shall be made in accordance with regulations issued by the Committee on Rules and Administration of the Senate.

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: c Effective date
children.text: The authority granted by subsection (a) shall not take effect until regulations are issued pursuant to subsection (b).
